revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Suppress categories/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Suppress categories/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Suppress categories/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Suppress categories/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Suppress categories/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Suppress categories/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 15 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Suppress categories}} {{Template shortcut|strip categories|suppresscats|stripcats|supcat}} This template strips [[Help:Category|categories]] from [[Help:Wiki markup|wikitext]]. For example, if passed the code "foo", it will return only "foo". It can be used to strip categories from templates as well; if passed the code "{{my template}}", it will return the template output minus the categories. The template properly handles categories escaped with the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], categories whose names include invalid characters such as ">", and categories that are surrounded with [[WP:NOWIKI|nowiki]] tags. However, it does not support complex wikitext such as nested links or [[WP:MAGIC|magic words]] like __TOC__. Even so, it should still remove the vast majority of categories from any given wikitext. == Usage == {{suppress categories|''input text''}} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|foobar}} | {{suppress categories|foobar}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo{{{some_parameter|}}}}} | {{suppress categories|foo{{{some_parameter|}}}}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Bad ca[]tegory link]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Bad ca[]tegory link]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[:Category:Colon trick]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[:Category:Colon trick]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Piped link|ba[]r]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Piped link|ba[]r]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[non-category link]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[non-category link]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|{{User alternative account name|Example}}}} | {{suppress categories|{{User alternative account name|Example}}}} |- |} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Category suppression]] * {{tl|Draft categories}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Another category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Another category]] [[Category:Bar]] [[Category:Bar]] [[Category:Piped link|bar]] [[Category:Piped link|bar]] [[ Category : Some category with spaces ]] [[ Category : Some category with spaces ]] [[Category:Wikipedia categorization|τSuppress categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Suppress categories}} {{Template shortcut|strip categories|suppresscats|stripcats|supcat}} This template strips [[Help:Category|categories]] from [[Help:Wiki markup|wikitext]]. For example, if passed the code "foo", it will return only "foo". It can be used to strip categories from templates as well; if passed the code "{{my template}}", it will return the template output minus the categories. The template properly handles categories escaped with the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], categories whose names include invalid characters such as ">", and categories that are surrounded with [[WP:NOWIKI|nowiki]] tags. However, it does not support complex wikitext such as nested links or [[WP:MAGIC|magic words]] like __TOC__. Even so, it should still remove the vast majority of categories from any given wikitext. == Usage == {{suppress categories|''input text''}} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|foobar}} | {{suppress categories|foobar}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo{{{some_parameter|}}}}} | {{suppress categories|foo{{{some_parameter|}}}}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Bad ca[]tegory link]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Bad ca[]tegory link]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[:Category:Colon trick]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[:Category:Colon trick]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Piped link|ba[]r]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[Category:Piped link|ba[]r]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo[[non-category link]]}} | {{suppress categories|foo[[non-category link]]}} |- | {{suppress categories|foo}} | {{suppress categories|foo}} |- | {{suppress categories|{{User alternative account name|Example}}}} | {{suppress categories|{{User alternative account name|Example}}}} |- |} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Category suppression]] * {{tl|Draft categories}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Another category]] [[Category:Some category]] [[Category:Another category]] [[Category:Bar]] [[Category:Bar]] [[Category:Piped link|bar]] [[Category:Piped link|bar]] [[ Category : Some category with spaces ]] [[ Category : Some category with spaces ]] [[Category:Wikipedia categorization|τSuppress categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
